rationale: For a digital service and tech consulting agency, a high-contrast dark theme conveys cutting-edge capability and elite professionalism. The Electric Lime accent specifically signals 'live', 'real-time', and 'available' which fits the calendar scheduling core functionality.

hierarchies.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchies.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-white

animations_and_3d.3d_strategy: Use react-three-fiber and @react-three/drei to render immersive floating 3D glass and neon geometric shapes (e.g., toruses, spheres) in the Hero section. Apply MeshPhysicalMaterial (transmission, low roughness) to mimic high-end tech hardware.
animations_and_3d.hover_states: Interactive cards must tilt slightly on mouse movement utilizing framer-motion (perspective, rotateX, rotateY) to simulate a physical 3D interface.
animations_and_3d.realtime_indicators: Available calendar slots and live statuses must feature a subtle pulsing glow animation using the primary_accent color.
animations_and_3d.page_load: Implement staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) using framer-motion for all text blocks, followed by the 3D elements dynamically scaling into view.

hero.layout: Split design: Left side content (H1 + CTA), Right/Background features an immersive R3F 3D canvas.
hero.visuals: Dark gradient overlay over background image, integrated with React Three Fiber 3D models.

service_cards.layout: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode A). Use tall cards for mobile app services and wide cards for web dev. Apply Glassmorphism surface styles.
service_cards.interactions: Hover states must trigger an inner 'Tracing Beam' border effect or a neon glow drop-shadow.

calendar_booking.layout: Two-column interactive bento layout. Left: Heavily customized Shadcn Calendar (dark mode, rounded-2xl). Right: Time slots displayed as interactive mono-font chips.
calendar_booking.states: Selected date -> Bright lime highlight. Unavailable -> opacity-30 and struck through. Available slot -> border-[#D1FF4D] hover:bg-[#D1FF4D] hover:text-[#0A0A0A].

booking_form.inputs: Shadcn input/textarea. Focus state MUST be: ring-2 ring-[#D1FF4D] bg-[#1A1A1A] border-transparent. No default blue focus rings.
booking_form.submit_button: Solid #D1FF4D background, black text (#0A0A0A), font-bold, hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 transition-transform. Must include data-testid='booking-submit-button'.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Dense spacing (gap-4) for data correlation. Sidebar navigation.
admin_dashboard.cards: Flat solid background (#111), crisp 1px border, no heavy drop-shadows. Use JetBrains Mono for all analytics and metric digits.

image_urls.description: Dynamic abstract 3D geometry with neon lights. Blend this under the React Three Fiber canvas with low opacity (30%) for depth.
Indonesian professional working on a laptop. Use in the About Us or Testimonials section to localize the agency's presence.
Sleek dark workspace setup. Use as an atmospheric background for the final CTA or footer section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for scroll reveals and card hover 3D tilt effects.
Install 'react-three-fiber' and '@react-three/drei' to implement the hero 3D visuals. Keep the scene performant.
Ensure the entire application uses the dark theme palette exactly as defined. AVOID any generic Tailwind blue, purple, or indigo defaults.
Shadcn components (Calendar, Forms, Dialogs) MUST be stripped of Vercel-style defaults and customized with the surface colors, 1px border (#fff/10), and #D1FF4D focus rings.
The application language MUST be entirely in Bahasa Indonesia as per user request.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, time slots, calendar days) MUST include a specific data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case-role (e.g., data-testid='time-slot-0900').
